title: JujutsuAlm
description: JujutsuAlm adds CT spinning, new mobs. Its an addon for the JujutsuCraft mod.
body:
JujutsuAlm (JJAlm)

JujutsuAlm is an addon mod for JujutsuCraft that adds a Cursed Technique spinning system.



Cursed Technique Spinning

Spin for Cursed Techniques using CT Orbs with an in-game spin screen:

CT Spin Orb (random roll)

Guaranteed rarity orbs: Common / Rare / Epic / Legendary / Strongest
Chances are configurable and synced from the Server to the clients.

Dynamic Rarity System (Config)

Optional system that adjusts CT chances based on how many players own a technique (owned CTs become rarer).



Binding Vows System

Adds a Binding Vow menu (keybind) and admin commands to manage vows:

/vow list, /vow active, /vow give, /vow remove, /vow clear, /vow info

New Mob Content

Adds a new custom mob (spawn egg included):

GojoKuna
YutaKuna

Gojo Unsealed
John Kaisen



Mission System

there is a small preset for Quests.. Admins can make their own Quests or Bounties!!




High-Resolution Skin Support

Upload custom skins at 128x128, 256x256, or 512x512 resolution. 

Accessible via hotkey.



CT Icons

Made CT Icons in the Cursed Technique Changer credits to TechnoDagger.



Included Cursed Technique:

Adds the Geto cursed technique (already exist in jjc but it constantly loads a dim this one is better)



Requirements

JujutsuCraft (REQUIRED)
AlmirionCore (REQUIRED)

Both are auto installed!

Legendary Survival Overhaul is optional and has compatibility included.
